description: Seed queries used by the salient-sentence extractor to score per-chunk lines for code-corpus salience (function purpose, API surface, invariants, error handling).
seeds: What does this function or class do, and what is its public contract?
What inputs does this code accept, and what does it return or raise?
What invariants, preconditions, or postconditions does this code enforce?
What error or edge-case handling is present, and what conditions trigger it?
What other modules or symbols does this depend on or extend?
